title: ObsidianFPS
description: ObsidianFPS delivers smoother performance and essential quality-of-life improvements while preserving the vanilla Minecraft experience.
body:
**🖤 ObsidianFPS — Maximum FPS. Pure Vanilla.
**
ObsidianFPS is a lightweight Fabric modpack designed to boost FPS, reduce lag, and deliver a smoother Minecraft experience without changing the core gameplay. It focuses on improving performance through faster chunk loading, reduced stuttering, and stable frame pacing, making it perfect for low-end and mid-range systems.

The modpack stays completely true to vanilla, with no gameplay changes or unfair advantages, and works safely on any multiplayer server. It also includes subtle visual and UI improvements for better clarity, along with optional shader support for those who want enhanced visuals without sacrificing performance.

Built for players who want Minecraft to feel the same — just faster, smoother, and more responsive. 🚀
